title: Tap the GET STARTED button
expected_result: The user is navigated to a new screen

title: Verify the search bar is functional
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the search bar, Step 2: Enter '1234567890' into the search bar, Step 3: Tap the search icon
expected_result: The search results display relevant contact information

title: Verify the map displays a location pin
expected_result: A red pin is displayed on the map indicating a location

title: Verify the user profile card displays correct information
test_steps: Step 1: Observe the user profile card
expected_result: The profile picture, name 'Jennifer', and subtitle 'Top model' are displayed correctly

title: Verify the Facebook social media icon opens the Facebook app or website
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the Facebook social media icon
expected_result: The Facebook app or facebook.com opens

title: Verify the LinkedIn social media icon opens the LinkedIn app or website
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the LinkedIn social media icon
expected_result: The LinkedIn app or linkedin.com opens

title: Verify the Google+ social media icon opens the Google+ app or website
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the Google+ social media icon
expected_result: The Google+ app or google.com/+ opens

title: Verify the accessibility of the search bar
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the text in the search bar is readable and has good contrast
expected_result: The text in the search bar meets the accessibility criteria

title: Verify the accessibility of the social media icons
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the social media icons are easily distinguishable
expected_result: The social media icons meet the accessibility criteria

title: Verify the accessibility of the CTA button
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the CTA button is clearly labeled and has good contrast
expected_result: The CTA button meets the accessibility criteria
